name: /pr-corpus-learn pattern with insufficient evidence is skipped and reported in the learning summary
command: mkdir -p pr-corpus && printf '[{"id":"p-strong","verbatim_quote":"x","usefulness_estimate":4,"supporting_prs":[{"number":1,"org":"a","tier":1},{"number":2,"org":"b","tier":1},{"number":3,"org":"c","tier":1}]},{"id":"p-weak","verbatim_quote":"y","usefulness_estimate":4,"supporting_prs":[{"number":4,"org":"a","tier":1}]}]\n' > pr-corpus/patterns.json && printf '{"gate":"pass"}\n' > pr-corpus/quality-eval.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/pr-corpus-learn.sh" --patterns pr-corpus/patterns.json --gate-result pr-corpus/quality-eval.json --dry-run 2>out.txt && grep -q 'promoted=p-strong' out.txt && grep -q 'skipped=p-weak' out.txt && grep -q 'reason=insufficient-evidence' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
